lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The interior and exterior show no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical and electrical systems are fully functional and perform as new.
The car is in good condition. It is well-maintained and mechanically sound. There are minor signs of cosmetic wear on the exterior and interior, but it requires no immediate repairs.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, representing a rare opportunity to own a showroom-quality example. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its original deep luster with absolutely no scratches, dings, or stone chips. Inside, the interior is immaculate and looks as if it has never been sat in, with pristine upholstery and every electronic component functioning perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in peak condition, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment. It drives exceptionally well, offering the same tight and responsive feel as it did when new. This is a collector-grade vehicle that has been cared for with the utmost attention to detail.

Step into luxury with this absolutely pristine vehicle! It is in truly mint condition, looking and driving just like it did the day it rolled off the lot. Meticulously cared for and kept in showroom shape, this is a rare opportunity to own a flawless car that feels brand new and has been maintained to the highest standard.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to be roadworthy. The engine currently runs roughly and the transmission exhibits noticeable slipping. Externally, the car shows its age with significant rust on the lower panels, multiple dents, and failing paint. The interior has sustained heavy wear, including torn upholstery and non-functional electronics. This car is being sold as-is, best suited as a parts donor or a major restoration project for a dedicated mechanic.

We are privileged to present this impeccably preserved specimen, maintained to an exacting showroom standard. This vehicle represents the zenith of its production run, boasting a flawless aesthetic profile and a mechanical integrity that remains beyond reproach. Every component has been curated to ensure it meets the requirements of the most sophisticated collector. For the discerning driver who demands uncompromising quality and an investment-grade automotive experience, this offering stands as a peerless choice.

Hey there! Thanks so much for stopping by to check out my ride! I honestly hate to see this one go, but it's time for it to find a new home. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've totally babied it since day one, kept it garaged, and it's still sparkling inside and out. If you're looking for a car that’s been loved and cared for with zero flaws, you’ve definitely found it. Shoot me a message if you want to come take a look!

Mint condition. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Garage kept.

Experience automotive perfection with this truly mint-condition masterpiece. This vehicle has been meticulously pampered, stored in a climate-controlled garage, and treated with a premium ceramic coating that makes the deep, lustrous paint pop as if it just rolled off the assembly line. The interior is a time capsule: the premium leather remains supple and free of any wear, with that unmistakable new-car scent still lingering. Every button, switch, and digital display functions flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine is spotless, backed by a complete, documented service history from day one. It drives with the precision and smoothness of a brand-new car, offering a quiet, composed ride with zero mechanical issues or leaks. This isn't just a used car; it’s a collector-grade example for the most discerning buyer who demands nothing less than excellence.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in an impeccable, showroom-original state, reflecting a standard of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, adheres to the highest aesthetic and mechanical benchmarks. For the discerning individual who demands uncompromising quality, this offering represents a premier acquisition.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained in absolute mint condition. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior and a meticulously preserved interior that satisfies the most discerning collector. Rigorously inspected to ensure mechanical perfection, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its original debut. An acquisition of this caliber is a rare opportunity for those who demand uncompromising quality and peerless automotive integrity.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty. It’s seriously in pristine condition—looks and drives just like it did when it first rolled off the lot! I've babied this car since day one, and it shows. If you're looking for something that's practically flawless and ready for a new home, this is definitely the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!

Used car for sale. Mint condition. Garage-kept. Low mileage. Clean title. No mechanical issues.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines 'mint condition.' This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, ensuring the exterior paint retains its deep, factory-fresh luster with absolutely zero swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections. The interior is a total time capsule; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and free of any bolster wear, while the original carpeting and trim show no signs of use. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, operates exactly as it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule documented by a comprehensive folder of service records from the original dealership. With a clean title, no history of accidents, and a smooth, quiet ride that mirrors a brand-new car, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a collector-quality example that is ready for the road or the show field.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary vehicle maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious care. Every component operates with factory-level precision, offering an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning enthusiast. We invite you to experience this peerless example of engineering integrity.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle exhibits a pristine aesthetic profile, complemented by a flawless mechanical pedigree. Every facet of this automobile reflects an uncompromising commitment to preservation, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original showroom delivery. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! I’m so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it’s in pristine condition—it looks and feels just like it rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken incredible care of it, so there are no scratches or dents, and the interior is completely spotless. You really have to see it in person to believe how beautiful it is. It’s ready for its next adventure, so feel free to reach out if you want to take a look!

Offered is a museum-grade specimen featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering peak torque through six individual throttle bodies and a precision Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. This chassis exhibits zero subframe fatigue, with a factory-spec limited-slip differential and a dual-VANOS system fastidiously maintained for optimal cam timing. The suspension geometry remains true, benefiting from fresh bushings and OEM dampers, ensuring the legendary 50/50 weight distribution is fully realized. With concours-level paint depth and bolster-wear-free Nappa leather, this unit represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated longitudinal engineering.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Full service history. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

Presenting an exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that has been meticulously preserved. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero paint chips, scratches, or door dings. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition; the leather is supple with no bolster wear, the carpets are spotless, and it retains that fresh, new-car scent. This vehicle has been strictly garage-kept and exclusively hand-washed. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, with a full documented service history and performance that remains as sharp as the day it was first delivered. Every electronic component and safety feature functions perfectly. This is a rare, investment-grade example for the discerning collector who demands the absolute best.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no signs of wear and benefiting from a rigorous maintenance history. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation are beyond reproach, offering a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a truly peerless example of its class.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, preserved in impeccable showroom condition. This motorcar exhibits flawless aesthetics and absolute mechanical integrity, reflecting a standard of maintenance that is truly beyond reproach. An acquisition of this pedigree offers the discerning driver an unparalleled experience of luxury and reliability, representing the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! You have to see this absolute beauty. It is in truly flawless condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken incredible care of it, and it shows in every single detail. It’s super clean, super reliable, and ready for its next adventure. You’re going to love it!

This collector-grade E46 M3 exemplifies mechanical excellence. Powered by the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, it features individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline, delivering 333hp through a precise Getrag six-speed manual gearbox. This example has undergone rigorous preventative maintenance, including a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement. The rear subframe has been structurally reinforced to ensure long-term chassis integrity. Retaining its factory-spec limited-slip differential and unmodified suspension geometry, this vehicle offers an unadulterated, analog driving experience. The exterior finish and interior upholstery remain in showroom condition, free from typical bolster wear or pixel degradation.
Mint condition. Flawless original paint. Pristine interior. Full service history. No mechanical issues. Garage kept.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in showroom condition since day one. The exterior boasts a flawless, deep-luster finish with absolutely no swirl marks, chips, or imperfections, complemented by factory-fresh alloy wheels. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather upholstery retains its original scent and texture, showing zero signs of wear, while every technological feature and control operates with precision. Mechanically, it is indistinguishable from new, having been meticulously serviced exclusively at authorized dealerships with a complete, documented history. Always garaged under a soft cover and never driven in inclement weather, this car offers a rare opportunity to own a true collector-grade example that drives as perfectly as it looks.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of uncompromising quality, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom condition, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Every detail reflects meticulous preservation, ensuring a driving experience indistinguishable from new. We invite serious inquiries for this investment-grade acquisition.
